commands.summary: Backend build passed with sanitizeAgentText and AGENT_CONTENT_PROVENANCE labeling/sanitizing untrusted agent content.
Tests cover control/zero-width stripping, look-alike system/operator prefix defang, length bounds, provenance labeling on /api/agent-messages, and sanitized+labeled replay.
Local audit passed after AGH-024 implementation and ledger updates.

environment.process_note: AGH-024: agent-supplied content is labeled agent_unverified, sanitized against control/zero-width/look-alike-prompt spoofing, and never auto-executed or auto-trusted.
